event_name: Cypher 3rd Birthday Beers - Super Limited Collabs
date_text: Sat, Apr 11th • 12:00 PM AEST - Wed, Apr 15th • 11:00 PM AEST
description: Just when you thought the coast was clear and Akasha’s birthday celebrations were wrapped up… it wouldn’t be Sweeney’s without us throwing something a little extra into the mix. This weekend, we’re celebrating Cypher Brewing Co.’s 3rd Birthday — and they’ve gone all out. Teaming up with some of the best in the game — Jarvis Bay, Kicks Brewing, Seeker, Dangerous Ales, BentSpoke, and Future Brewing — Cypher has dropped three incredible collaboration beers that showcase the creativity and firepower of this stacked lineup. These beers are seriously limited, only pouring outside the brewery at three venues… with your next closest stop being Newcastle. So if you want to get your hands on them, you know where you need to be. Head into Sweeney’s this Saturday and across the weekend to get amongst it. And as if that wasn’t enough, we’re backing it up with a couple of heavy hitters on the taps: – Vibe in Strides — a punchy 6.5% West Coast IPA – Astral Dive — a bold 9% 'Winter Warmer' Good beer, good chaos, and another reason to make your weekend count. See you at the bar.

event_name: Molly Rose Brewing 12 keg Tap Takeover
date_text: Thu, Apr 16th • 12:00 PM AEST - Sun, Apr 19th • 10:00 PM AEST
description: For the first time ever at Hotel Sweeney’s, we’re pouring a full 12-tap takeover from Molly Rose Brewing — and it’s their first full Sydney event in three years. Known for pushing boundaries while keeping things seriously drinkable, Molly Rose blends creativity, technique, and a bit of fun into every pour. Expect bold flavours, unique twists, and a lineup you won’t see anywhere else. Taplist: - Skylight IPA (5.7%) - When Life Gives You Lemons – Lemon Saison (4.2%) - Short & Stout – Dry Irish Stout (4.3%) - Lager #3 – Helles (4.6%) - Bierchen #1– Altbier (4.8%) - Home Camp High Country Ale – American Amber (4.8%) - Majestic Weasel – Cali IPA (6.1%) - Here Fishy Fishy WCIPA (6.2%) - Flash Pale Ale (5.3%) - Gorn Fishin’ – Dank WCIPA (6.2%) - Nocino Noir – Barrel Fermented Dark Farmhouse w Green Walnut & Apricot(6%) - Peach Peach Nectarine - Barrel Fermented Farmhouse Ale (4.3%) From crisp and classic to weird and wonderful — this is a rare chance to work your way through the full spectrum of what Molly Rose does best. Grab your crew, get in early, and settle in. This one’s going to be special.
